# Cerebellum — Ablation-Informed Quantization for LLMs

## What It Is
Tensor-level precision allocation for GGUF quantization. Measures tensor sensitivity via ablation and assigns quantization types under a target size budget. Models for people who are poor.

## How It Works
1. Ablate — crush each tensor to Q2_K individually, measure perplexity impact
2. Classify — label tensors by measured sensitivity and PPL delta
3. Allocate — high-sensitivity tensors get higher precision, low-sensitivity stay at Q2_K
4. Multi-pass promotion — tensors climb quant levels until the budget is exhausted

The result: smaller files with less quality loss than uniform quants. Sometimes demoting tensors actually improves the model.

## Released Models

| Model | Architecture | Size | HumanEval | ARC | HellaSwag | MMLU |
|-------|-------------|------|-----------|-----|-----------|------|
| Granite 4.1 30B v2 | Dense | 13 GB | 82.3% | 91.6% | 88.9% | 73.5% |
| Qwen 3.6 27B v4 | Dense | 12 GB | 75.0% | 95.1% | 91.2% | 82.5% |
| Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B v1 | SSM+MoE | 12 GB | 75.0% | 94.8% | 91.5% | 73.9% |
| Gemma 4 26B-A4B v6 | MoE | 11.7 GB | 72.0% | 95.6% | 84.7% | 71.2% |
| Gemma 4 E4B v2 | Dense (PLE) | 4.2 GB | 68.3% | 85.7% | 75.3% | 58.4% |
| Granite 4.0-H-Small v1 | Mamba2+MoE | 14.2 GB | — | 90.7% | 87.1% | 68.6% |

All benchmarks measured locally on RTX 3090 with llama.cpp. Temperature=0, no thinking mode.

## Key Findings
- Demoting tensors can improve the model (Granite attn K/Q/output, Gemma E4B beats BF16 PPL)
- MoE fragility is in expert weights, not auxiliary signals (opposite of dense models)
- Hybrid SSM models have hard precision cliffs (below 4-bit = NaN)
- PLE tensors in Gemma 4 cliff between Q4_K and Q3_K
- Cross-layer effects are ~86% additive
- Same-layer interaction effects are strong (87% regression crushing two FFN tensors together)

## Architecture Support
- Dense transformers (Qwen 3.6, Granite 4.1)
- MoE (Gemma 4 26B-A4B, Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B)
- Hybrid SSM+MoE (Granite 4.0-H-Small)
- PLE models (Gemma 4 E4B)

## Available on HuggingFace
- deucebucket/Granite-4.1-30B-Cerebellum-GGUF
- deucebucket/Qwen3.6-27B-Cerebellum-v4-GGUF
- deucebucket/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Cerebellum-GGUF
- deucebucket/Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-Cerebellum-v6-GGUF
- deucebucket/Gemma-4-E4B-it-Cerebellum-v2-GGUF
- deucebucket/Granite-4.0-H-Small-Cerebellum-GGUF

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/deucebucket/cerebellum
- HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/deucebucket
- Author: deucebucket
- Format: GGUF (llama.cpp, ollama compatible)
